mapper.sql: QSTN_SN AS qstnSn, SUBJ_ID AS subjId, RGTR_ID AS rgtrId, LAST_MDFR_ID AS lastMdfrId, TO_CHAR(REG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS regDt, TO_CHAR(MDFCN_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS mdfcnDt, QSTN_TYPE_CD AS qstnTypeCd, DIFF_CD AS diffCd, AI_GEN_YN AS aiGenYn, ALLOC_SCR AS allocScr, CORR_ANSW_CN AS corrAnswCn, QSTN_CN AS qstnCn, EXPLN_CN AS explnCn, STAT_CD AS statCd
mapper.select: SELECT FROM QUESTION_LIST WHERE RGTR_ID = #{rgtrId} AND STAT_CD != '99' ORDER BY QSTN_TYPE_CD ASC, REG_DT DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO QUESTION_LIST ( SUBJ_ID, RGTR_ID, REG_DT, MDFCN_DT, QSTN_TYPE_CD, DIFF_CD, AI_GEN_YN, ALLOC_SCR, CORR_ANSW_CN, QSTN_CN, EXPLN_CN, STAT_CD ) VALUES ( #{subjId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{rgtrId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{qstnTypeCd}, #{diffCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{aiGenYn}, #{allocScr, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{corrAnswCn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{qstnCn, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{explnCn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '01' )
mapper.update: UPDATE QUESTION_LIST SET SUBJ_ID = #{subjId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, QSTN_TYPE_CD = #{qstnTypeCd}, DIFF_CD = #{diffCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ALLOC_SCR = #{allocScr, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, CORR_ANSW_CN = #{corrAnswCn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, QSTN_CN = #{qstnCn, jdbcType=CLOB}, EXPLN_CN = #{explnCn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_MDFR_ID = #{lastMdfrId}, MDFCN_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE QSTN_SN = #{qstnSn} AND STAT_CD != '99'
UPDATE QUESTION_LIST SET STAT_CD = '99' WHERE QSTN_SN = #{qstnSn} AND STAT_CD != '99'
